nodes.name: Chestnut-capped flycatcher
nodes.summary: The chestnut-capped flycatcher (Erythrocercus mccallii) is a species of bird in the family Erythrocercidae. Distribution and habitat It is found throughout the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical swamps and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. Subspecies E. m. mccallii: Southeast Nigeria to Cameroon, Gabon and Democratic Republic of the Congo E. m. nigeriae: Sierra Leone to Guinea and southwest Nigeria E. m. congicus: East and south Democratic Republic of the Congo to w Uganda References

nodes.name: Erythrocercus
nodes.summary: Erythrocercus（Erythrocercus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Chestnut-capped flycatcher、Little yellow flycatcher、Livingstone's flycatcher。
